unit.name: WP_Http request stream default-filename decision
unit.area: src/wp-includes/class-wp-http.php with WP_HTTP_Requests_Hooks, WP_HTTP_Requests_Response, WP_HTTP_Proxy, WP_HTTP_Response, and WP_Http_Cookie support
unit.public_contract: This candidate promotes only the WP_Http::request branch decision that streaming requests with an empty parsed filename should assign the PHP-owned get_temp_dir() . basename(url) default filename. PHP still owns public WP_Http::request ABI, request defaults and filters, temp-dir lookup, basename/path semantics, native parsed-args mutation, writable-directory validation, forced blocking behavior, header/cookie/redirect/SSL/max_bytes/data_format handoff, Requests dispatch, response filtering, and native arrays/objects.

bridge.removal_gate: Replace copied public PHP with generated original-path adapters and pass request orchestration, selected upstream HTTP PHPUnit, installed distribution, and live/recorded network parity gates before claiming public PHP ownership.
